definitions.text: From or in a nearby location.
Connected directly to a particular computer, processor, etc.; able to be accessed offline.
Having limited scope (either lexical or dynamic); only accessible within a certain portion of a program.
A person who lives in or near a given place.
examples: It's easy to tell the locals from the tourists.

definitions.text: A branch of a nationwide organization such as a trade union.
examples: I'm in the TWU, too. Local 6.
The expresses skipped my station, so I had to take a local.

definitions.text: In the local area; within a city, state, country, etc.
examples: It's never been more important to buy local.
